summary: Install the plugins and skills needed for LangGraph/LangSmith/prompt-caching agent development.

outputs.name: installed_stack_manifest
outputs.description: List of plugins installed and skills synced.

workflow_steps: Install the 4 Claude plugins defined in the stack.
Sync analyse-langsmith-trace, debug-prompt-caching, and benchmark skills into every ~/.claude* profile.

verification.smoke_test: Run `claude plugins list` and verify superpowers, vercel, and sentry are installed.
